action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Establishment is not free of harborage or conditions conducive to rodents, insects or other pests.
Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sanitized after each use and following any activity when contamination may have occurred.
Live roaches in facility's food or non-food area.
Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager or supervisor of food operations.

Lighting inadequate; permanent lighting not provided in food preparation areas, ware washing areas, and storage rooms. Shatterproof bulb or shield to prevent broken glass from falling into food or onto surfaces, not installed.
Dishwashing and ware washing:  Cleaning and sanitizing of tableware, including dishes, utensils, and equipment deficient.
Wash hands sign not posted near or above hand washing sink.
Smoking or electronic cigarette use allowed in prohibited area
“Choking first aid” poster not posted. “Alcohol and pregnancy” warning sign not posted. Resuscitation equipment: exhaled air resuscitation masks (adult & pediatric), latex gloves, sign not posted.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sanitized after each use and following any activity when contamination may have occurred.
Pesticide not properly labeled or used by unlicensed individual.  Pesticide, other toxic chemical improperly used/stored. Unprotected, unlocked bait station used.
Food, supplies, and equipment not protected from potential source of contamination during storage, preparation, transportation, display or service.
Food allergy information poster not conspicuously posted where food is being prepared or processed by food workers.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Raw, cooked or prepared food is adulterated, contaminated, cross-contaminated, or not discarded in accordance with HACCP plan.

Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.
Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning and sanitizing of tableware, including dishes, utensils, and equipment deficient.

Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not provided where required; equipment or floor not properly drained; sewage disposal system in disrepair or not functioning properly. Condensation or liquid waste improperly disposed of.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager or supervisor of food operations.

Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.
